response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and demonstrable fluency in diverse technologies including DLang and cloud tooling, but lacks clear evidence of AI product ownership, cloud platform strategy leadership, or advanced AI/ML expertise required for a director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial spirit with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Broad technical fluency across cloud, backend, and embedded systems (DLang, Node, AWS CDK)
Strong track record of technical mentoring and knowledge sharing via workshops and open-source tools
concerns: No explicit AI/ML product development or research experience cited
Lacks demonstrable cloud platform strategy or customer advisory experience at scale
No advanced degree in AI or related field; education limited to BS in Computer Science
